entities.name: SOCIAL MEDIA
entities.description: Digital communication platforms used by scientists to share views, facilitate understanding, and build public opinion

entities.name: COMMUNICATION
entities.description: The act of sharing scientific views and facilitating greater understanding of research work

entities.name: SCIENTISTS
entities.description: Professionals who use popular and social media to communicate their work and influence public opinion

entities.name: M. S. SWAMINATHAN
entities.description: A renowned agriculture scientist and influential Indian who used Twitter for scientific communication

entities.name: TWITTER
entities.description: A social media platform used by M. S. Swaminathan as a tool for communication and analyzed as a case study

entities.name: CASE STUDY
entities.description: A research method used to analyze the themes articulated by a scientist on a social media platform

entities.name: SCIENCE
entities.description: A field of study and a subject of discussion facilitated by social media communication

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A subject of discussion and progress facilitated by social media communication

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location where scientists are encouraged to intervene more actively in social media for authenticity and accuracy

entities.name: PUBLIC OPINION
entities.description: The collective views of the public that can be built and influenced by scientists using social media
